title: Fluffy Herbal Chocolate Pie
description: A festive British dessert featuring dark chocolate chips and herbal flavors, suitable for egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: 3 cups chopped dark chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: chilled and cut into small pieces

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons fresh thyme leaves
ingredients.notes: freshly picked, optional for added flavor

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch pie dish with melted butter.
In a saucepan, heat almond milk and cocoa powder over medium heat. Stir until smooth. Add honey or maple syrup and bring to a simmer; stir until combined.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly. Fold in the melted chocolate chips gently. Gently fold in thyme leaves and ground cloves (if using). Mix well to combine.
Pour mixture into prepared pie dish. Sprinkle with salt evenly over top of filling.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until crust is golden brown and center appears set but still soft when touched gently with a toothpick.
Allow to cool on a wire rack before serving.
